gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/338)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/338)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَمَّنْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ الْكِسْوَةُ فِي كَفَّارَةِ الْيَمِينِ قَالَ ثَوْبٌ يُوَارِي بِهِ عَوْرَتَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, and Al Hajjaj, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from Moamar Bin Umar who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the one upon whom is Obligated the clothing with regards to an expiation. He<sup>asws</sup> said:’ A cloth by which his nakedness is covered’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr and ai-Hajjai from Tha‘labah ibn Maymun from Mu’ammar ibn ‘Umar who has narrated the foliowing: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who must clothe the needy because of expiation due to oath. He (the Imam) said, ‘ It is a kind of clothing which can cover his privacy.’”
